name: Ratatouille Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 cup tomato sauce, Italian Style chunky
1 small yellow summer squash, cut lengthwise into
1/4 teaspoon red pepper, crushed, if desired
recipeInstructions:
1. Move oven rack to the lowest position.
2. Heat oven to 450 degrees F.
3. Grease a cookie sheet or 12-inch pizza pan.
4. Mix baking mix and water until a soft dough forms.
5. Press the dough into a 12-inch circle on the cookie sheet or in the pizza pan, using fingers dipped in baking mix; pinch the edge to form a 1/2 inch rim.
6. Spread tomato sauce over the dough.
7. Top with onion, green pepper, squash, and eggplant.
8. Sprinkle with red pepper and cheese.
9. Bake for 12 to 15 minutes or until the crust is golden brown.
